title: AI Agents: The Productivity Multiplier You’re Ignoring
hook: Most teams still use AI for quick answers, but the real power is in letting agents handle full workflows.
partner_takeaway: Readers will learn how to set up and delegate longer, complex tasks to AI agents, expanding productivity in their daily work.
reasoning: This combines a high-signal external trend with a tactical workflow story, showing readers a practical way to use AI agents immediately. It fits the track’s focus on actionable patterns and answers 'what would they do differently?'

title: AI Is Accelerating Scientific Discovery—What That Means for Your Industry
hook: In the past week, AI helped solve a three-year-old immunology mystery and is starting to unlock new frontiers in scientific knowledge.
partner_takeaway: Readers will gain insight into how AI’s ability to solve complex scientific problems is reshaping innovation timelines and startup strategies.
reasoning: This idea draws from two high-relevance signals and gives a timely trend read on AI’s expanding impact. It’s relevant for industry leaders looking beyond hype to real shifts in market structure and innovation.

title: Shipping My First AI-Powered Feature: Lessons from the Trenches
hook: The first time I shipped an AI-powered feature to production, I expected magic. What I got was a crash course in edge cases and user feedback.
partner_takeaway: Readers will see concrete lessons learned from deploying AI in production, including how to handle unexpected issues and iterate based on real user input.
reasoning: This is a classic 'building in public' story, giving practical insights from personal experience. It helps demystify AI deployment and encourages others to learn from real-world shipping, matching the track’s hands-on framing.

title: A Pattern for Reliable AI Workflows
hook: Every time I build an AI workflow, I return to a simple pattern that keeps things from going off the rails.
partner_takeaway: Readers will learn a repeatable pattern for structuring AI workflows to avoid common mistakes and improve reliability.
reasoning: This delivers a tactical, immediately usable tip from lived experience. It’s short and sharp, ideal for practical AI readers who want actionable advice without fluff.
